brief_notes: Compact baseline covering the same results. All key numbers verified: same R/MAE for all four cross-species predictions (0.5729/0.3758, 0.6153/1.1236, 0.4823/8.3610, 0.2898/7.6157), N=370/181, ages 11.1±1.8 / 2.8±0.6, 62/117/239 features. Uses 3 tables. No figures. Methods cover MRI scanning parameters (TR/TE, b values, voxel resolution) faithful to extraction. Briefer discussion.
